SpecificIssue: Images in Suggested result no alt text (WCAG 1.1.1)
ExpandedDescription: Search suggestion results in ServiceNow Service Portal display images without proper alt text, violating WCAG 1.1.1. Screen reader users receive no context about the suggested items, leading to poor navigation in search features.,
AcceptanceCriteria: All images in search suggestions have descriptive alt text or are marked decorative with aria-hidden.,
Test: Run search in litmus widget or real portal, inspect suggestions with axe-core; confirm no missing alt violations.,
Solution1: Add alt text via widget templates in core-overrides.,
Solution2: CSS fallback with aria-label for suggestion images.,
Solution3: a11y.scss rule enforcing alt on search images.,

SpecificIssue: Search results images no defined names (WCAG 1.1.1)
ExpandedDescription: Search result images lack accessible names (alt or aria-label), violating WCAG 1.1.1. Screen readers announce generic or no information for result thumbnails.,
AcceptanceCriteria: Every search result image has a meaningful accessible name.,
Test: Perform search and inspect results with screen reader; confirm proper announcement.,
Solution1: Override search result image templates with alt in core-overrides.,

SpecificIssue: Action menu decorative image in name (WCAG 1.1.1)
ExpandedDescription: Action menu icons are included in accessible name without being marked decorative, causing screen readers to announce irrelevant icon descriptions in lists and tables.,
AcceptanceCriteria: Decorative action menu images are properly hidden from screen readers.,
Test: Inspect action menus in litmus widget; confirm icons are silent to screen readers.,
Solution1: Add aria-hidden to action menu icons in core-overrides.,
Solution2: CSS rule for decorative menu items.,

ExpandedDescription: The cloud icon (loading or status) is focusable but has no purpose or label, violating WCAG 1.1.1 and 2.4.7.,
AcceptanceCriteria: Non-interactive cloud icons are not focusable and have proper aria-hidden.,
Test: Tab through page with loading states; confirm cloud icon is skipped.,
Solution1: Add tabindex="-1" and aria-hidden to cloud icons in core-overrides.,

ExpandedDescription: Remove from Wishlist text uses heading level 1 incorrectly in catalog, violating WCAG 1.3.1 heading hierarchy.,
AcceptanceCriteria: All headings follow proper hierarchy; no misuse of h1.,
Test: Inspect wishlist section in litmus or catalog; confirm heading levels are correct.,
Solution1: Change to appropriate heading level in widget templates in core-overrides.,

SpecificIssue: Radio group in Thanks dialog no association (WCAG 1.3.1)
ExpandedDescription: Radio buttons in "Thanks" dialog lack proper grouping and labels, violating WCAG 1.3.1.,
AcceptanceCriteria: Radio groups have fieldset/legend and associated labels.,
Test: Open thanks dialog and inspect with axe-core; confirm grouping passes.,
Solution1: Add fieldset/legend in dialog templates in core-overrides.,

ExpandedDescription: Required fields in forms lack aria-required or HTML5 required, violating WCAG 1.3.1.,
AcceptanceCriteria: All required fields have aria-required="true" and visible indicator.,
Test: Inspect forms in litmus widget; confirm required attributes present.,
Solution1: Add aria-required to form fields in core-overrides.,

SpecificIssue: All headings level 4 on status page (WCAG 1.3.1)
ExpandedDescription: Status page uses multiple h4 headings without proper hierarchy, violating WCAG 1.3.1.,
AcceptanceCriteria: Headings follow logical hierarchy (h1-h6).,
Test: Inspect status page; confirm proper heading structure.,
Solution1: Update heading levels in status widget templates in core-overrides.,

ExpandedDescription: Add Attachment button has verbose, redundant description read by screen readers, violating WCAG 1.3.1.,
AcceptanceCriteria: Button accessible name is concise and clear.,
Test: Inspect attachment button with screen reader; confirm concise name.,
Solution1: Simplify accessible name in core-overrides templates.,

SpecificIssue: Reset Password steps no list formatting (WCAG 1.3.1)
ExpandedDescription: Reset password steps are not marked as ordered or unordered list, violating WCAG 1.3.1.,
AcceptanceCriteria: Steps are properly marked as <ol> or <ul> with correct roles.,
Test: Inspect reset password page; confirm list structure.,
Solution1: Update steps to list markup in core-overrides.,

ExpandedDescription: Question mark and checkmark icons are announced twice by screen readers due to duplicate text + icon, violating WCAG 1.3.1.,
AcceptanceCriteria: Icons have single concise announcement or are hidden if decorative.,
Test: Inspect icons with screen reader; confirm no duplicate announcements.,
Solution1: Add aria-hidden to redundant icons in core-overrides.,

ExpandedDescription: Legend text in forms is not marked as heading or proper label, violating WCAG 1.3.1.,
AcceptanceCriteria: Legend text uses appropriate heading or label markup.,
Test: Inspect forms with legends; confirm proper structure.,
Solution1: Update legend markup in core-overrides.,

ExpandedDescription: Date/time fields announce grouping three times due to redundant labels, violating WCAG 1.3.1.,
AcceptanceCriteria: Date/time groups announce once with clear context.,
Test: Inspect date/time fields with screen reader; confirm single announcement.,
Solution1: Simplify grouping markup in core-overrides.,

ExpandedDescription: Attachment button is wrapped in unnecessary list markup, violating WCAG 1.3.1.,
AcceptanceCriteria: Attachment buttons have clean non-list structure.,
Test: Inspect attachment button; confirm no unnecessary list.,
Solution1: Remove list wrapper in core-overrides templates.,

ExpandedDescription: Tooltips on hover/focus are not announced to screen readers, violating WCAG 1.3.1.,
AcceptanceCriteria: Tooltips use aria-describedby or proper role for announcement.,
Test: Hover/focus on tooltip elements; confirm announcement.,
Solution1: Add aria-describedby to tooltip triggers in core-overrides.,

ExpandedDescription: Modal dismiss "X" button is announced twice due to duplicate text/icon, violating WCAG 1.3.1.,
AcceptanceCriteria: Dismiss button has single clear accessible name.,
Test: Open modal and inspect close button with screen reader; confirm single announcement.,
Solution1: Simplify dismiss button markup in core-overrides.,

ExpandedDescription: Record links have multiple redundant references in accessible name, violating WCAG 1.3.1.,
AcceptanceCriteria: Record links have concise unique accessible names.,
Test: Inspect record links; confirm clean name.,
Solution1: Clean accessible name in core-overrides templates.,

ExpandedDescription: Search icon is announced three times due to redundant text/icon/title, violating WCAG 1.3.1.,
AcceptanceCriteria: Search icon has single concise announcement or is hidden.,
Test: Inspect search icon with screen reader; confirm single announcement.,
Solution1: Simplify search icon markup in core-overrides.,

ExpandedDescription: Knowledge article metadata is not marked with proper headings or labels, violating WCAG 1.3.1.,
AcceptanceCriteria: Article metadata uses semantic headings and labels.,
Test: Inspect knowledge article; confirm meaningful structure.,
Solution1: Update metadata markup in core-overrides.,

ExpandedDescription: Some metadata is bypassed or not announced by screen readers due to improper markup, violating WCAG 1.3.1.,
AcceptanceCriteria: All metadata is properly announced with correct roles.,
Test: Inspect metadata sections with screen reader; confirm full announcement.,
Solution1: Fix markup in core-overrides templates.,
